hooks.command: command -v groupchat >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo 'groupchat plugin: the `groupchat` binary is not on your PATH, so its MCP server cannot start. Install it from the latest release (the groupchat-installer.sh asset at https://github.com/ItsOhmar/groupchat/releases/latest), then run: groupchat install-mcp --client claude'
